documents.title: Appendix A: Indicator Identification Reference
documents.description: Labelled indicator lights can be found on the sides of the bomb casing.

documents.title: Appendix B: Battery Identification Reference
documents.description: Common battery types can be found within enclosures on the sides of the bomb casing.

battery_types.visual: Two batteries in a single enclosure
One large battery in a single enclosure

documents.title: Appendix C: Port Identification Reference
documents.description: Digital and analog ports can be found on sides of the bomb casing.
